    L

    lastUsed - Static variable in class DB.DBController
     
    lateArrivalsChart - Variable in class Controllers.ReportController
     
    listen() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    Begins the thread that waits for new clients.
    listen() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    Begins the thread that waits for new clients
    LISTENING_EXCEPTION - Static variable in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    The string sent to the observers when a listening exception occurred.
    listeningException(Throwable) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
    Hook method called when the server stops accepting connections because an exception has been raised.
    listeningException(Throwable) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AdaptableServer
    Hook method called when the server stops accepting connections because an exception has been raised.
    listeningException(Throwable) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableOriginatorServer
    Method called each time an exception is raised while listening.
    listeningException(Throwable) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
    This method is called when the server stops accepting connections because an exception has been raised.
    loadCurrentWeekWaitingList() - Method in class Controllers.WaitingListController
    Requests the current week's waiting list from the server.
    loadedOnce - Variable in class Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
     
    loadReservations() - Method in class Controllers.ReservationsController
    Loads all reservations from the client handler and filters only confirmed reservations to display them in the table.
    loadRestaurantSettings(RestaurantSettings) - Method in class Controllers.RestaurantSettingsController
    Loads restaurant settings into the tables.
    loadTimes(List) - Method in class Controllers.GuestWaitingListController
    Loads a list of available times into the timeComboBox.
    loadTimes(List) - Method in class Controllers.SubscriberWaitingListController
    Loads available times into the combo box.
    loadTimesForDate(LocalDate) - Method in class Controllers.GuestWaitingListController
    Loads available times for a specific date and number of guests.
    loadTimesForDate(LocalDate) - Method in class Controllers.SubscriberWaitingListController
    Requests available times from the server for the given date.
    lock - Static variable in class logicControllers.DailyFunctionController
     
    logicControllers - package logicControllers
     
    login(int, int) - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Logs in a user with ID and membership code
    LOGIN - Enum constant in enum class enums.ActionType
     
    LoginCommand - Class in commands
    Command implementation for handling user login requests.

    Constructs a new LoginCommand and initializes the user controller.

    LoginHandler - Class in handlers
    Handles server responses related to the user login process.

    LoginRequest - Class in messages
    Represents a request message to authenticate a user into the system.

    Constructs a new LoginRequest with the specified user credentials.

    ImageView for displaying the application logo.

    logoImageView - Variable in class Controllers.SupervisorController
    ImageView displaying the application logo.
    logout() - Method in class handlers.ClientHandler
    Logs out the current user
    LOGOUT - Enum constant in enum class enums.ActionType
     
    LogoutCommand - Class in commands
    Command implementation for handling user logout requests.
    LogoutCommand() - Constructor for class commands.LogoutCommand
     
    LogoutHandler - Class in handlers
    Handles the logout process for the client.
    LogoutHandler() - Constructor for class handlers.LogoutHandler
     
    LogoutRequest - Class in messages
    Represents a request message to log out a user from the system.
    LogoutRequest() - Constructor for class messages.LogoutRequest
    Constructs a new LogoutRequest.
    logoutUser(int) - Static method in class commands.LoginCommand
    Removes a user from the active users map, effectively logging them out.
